tool.name: ctljson
tool.title: Emit single JSON control message
tool.description: Emits a JSON document with $jio.ctl and $jio.ctl.elicit

body.value:
if [ "$1" = "accept" ]; then printf '%s' '{"ok":true}'; else printf '%s
' '{"$jio.ctl":true,"$jio.ctl.elicit":{"message":"confirm?","requestedSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{"confirm":{"type":"boolean"}},"required":["confirm"],"additionalProperties":false}}'; fi
